/services/project-management-consulting.description: Framer Template for Construction & Architecture Website
p: At Metanova, project management is about structure, foresight, and disciplined execution.

We lead residential and mixed-use developments through every critical phase — strategic planning, zoning approvals, infrastructure coordination, and construction oversight — ensuring projects remain financially controlled, regulatory-compliant, and aligned with development objectives.
Our role is to reduce uncertainty, protect capital, and maintain momentum from early planning through final delivery.

Strategic Planning & Feasibility Analysis – We assess project viability, land-use constraints, infrastructure requirements, and regulatory considerations to establish a clear and achievable development roadmap.
Zoning Amendments & Municipal Approvals– We manage zoning changes, approval processes, and coordination with municipalities to streamline regulatory pathways and prevent costly delays.
Budgeting & Cost Control – Our team develops realistic financial projections and monitors cost structures to protect margins and ensure responsible resource allocation.
Scheduling & Milestone Management – We create structured timelines, track progress, and coordinate stakeholders to maintain momentum and avoid disruption.
Infrastructure & Contractor Coordination – We oversee infrastructure works and coordinate contractors to ensure technical alignment and execution quality.
Risk Identification & Mitigation – We proactively assess technical, regulatory, and financial risks, implementing structured mitigation strategies to prevent setbacks.
Construction Oversight – We monitor on-site progress, maintain quality standards, and ensure adherence to approved plans and engineering requirements.
Stakeholder Coordination & Communication – We act as the central coordination point between developers, municipalities, consultants, engineers, and contractors.
At Metanova our project management and consulting services are designed to turn vision into reality with precision, expertise, and unwavering commitment to excellence.
We're here to help you bring your construction project to life! Whether you have questions, want to discuss your ideas.

/services/structural-engineering.title: Titen - Construction & Architecture Website
/services/structural-engineering.description: Framer Template for Construction & Architecture Website
p: At Metanova, structural engineering is about more than calculations — it is about delivering clarity, reducing risk, and ensuring every project is built on a solid foundation.

We work closely with developers, contractors, and property owners to design safe, efficient, and code-compliant structures that align with real-world construction demands. Our approach combines technical rigor with practical coordination to keep projects moving forward confidently.

Structural Feasibility & Assessment– We evaluate site conditions, building requirements, and structural constraints to determine the most efficient and cost-effective structural approach for your project.
Structural Design & Load Calculations – Our team performs detailed structural analysis and load calculations to ensure safety, durability, and regulatory compliance.
Concrete, Steel & Wood Design – We design structural systems tailored to each project’s scope, whether reinforced concrete foundations, steel framing systems, or engineered wood structures.
Technical Drawings & Engineering Documentation – We produce permit-ready drawings, structural plans, and detailed technical documentation to support seamless construction execution.
Code Compliance & Regulatory Coordination – We ensure full compliance with Quebec building codes and municipal regulations, reducing delays during approval and inspection processes.
Construction Phase Support – We collaborate with contractors during construction to review structural elements, address site challenges, and maintain engineering integrity throughout execution.
At Metanova, we don’t just design buildings—we create experiences, shaping spaces that enhance the way people live, work, and interact.

h2: Engineering Expertise Driving Real Estate Development
A Strategic Approach to Engineering and Development
p: To be a leading partner in structural engineering and real estate development, supporting the creation of large-scale, high-impact projects across Quebec.
To deliver optimized, value-engineered solutions that enhance project viability, reduce costs, and support efficient execution—from early-stage planning to construction.
We prioritize clarity, efficiency and results-driven thinking—delivering solutions that align engineering performance with financial objectives and real-world construction constraints.

Founded in 2022, Metanova Experts-Conseils brings together over 20 years of combined experience in structural engineering, real estate development and construction. The firm works alongside investors, developers and industry professionals to support the planning, structuring and execution of projects across Quebec.

Metanova is involved at every stage of a project, from site analysis and feasibility to design optimization and construction coordination. Our approach combines technical expertise with a development-driven perspective to deliver projects that are efficient, viable and aligned with market realities.
Development-Oriented – We approach each mandate with a focus on project viability, optimization and long-term value.
Value Engineering – We integrate cost optimization strategies from the earliest stages of design.
Integrated Execution – We ensure coordination between all stakeholders to support efficient and predictable delivery.
We integrate value engineering from the earliest stages to optimize design, reduce costs and improve overall project performance—without compromising quality or constructability.
We approach each project with a development perspective, focusing on site optimization, project viability and alignment with market and investment objectives.
We prioritize coordination and clarity to ensure smooth project delivery, maintaining control over timelines, costs and construction realities.
Our solutions evolve with project constraints, regulatory requirements and market conditions—ensuring flexibility and long-term success.

Suddam Al-Salem is a structural engineer specializing in buildings, steel, wood and concrete.    With several years' experience acquired with one of the most renowned companies in the field of structural engineering, NCK, Suddam Al-Salem has worked on projects of varying scope and complexity. As a project manager, he has developed comprehensive expertise in design, project management and site inspection, enabling him to master all the technical and organizational aspects of a project.    This global vision of the profession enables Suddam Al-Salem to fully understand the challenges specific to each project, and to provide innovative and appropriate solutions. He combines technical rigor and creativity to design robust, efficient structures, while ensuring that the project blends harmoniously into its environment.    Today, at the helm of Metanova Experts-Conseils, he puts his expertise at the service of his customers, whether for small projects or large-scale realizations, with one overriding priority: to provide a high-quality, personalized and efficient service, ensuring that each project is a technical and financial success.
Managing Partner – Real Estate Development Division

With over a decade of experience in real estate development, Muhannad has played a key role in the planning, structuring and execution of major projects across Quebec. His background in architecture and construction management, combined with eight years of experience as a general contractor, provides him with a comprehensive understanding of the entire development lifecycle. Since 2011, he has worked closely with municipalities, leading zoning change processes and securing project approvals, while collaborating with investors to structure financially viable, high-impact developments. His expertise lies in navigating regulatory frameworks, coordinating with key stakeholders, and aligning each project with market dynamics, investment strategies and long-term community growth.
Ready to take the first step toward realizing your dream project? Contact us today for a consultation and let's turn your vision into a reality.
